controller.description: Top-level orchestrator: requirements → design → decomposition → execution → merge → test → delivery

tdd-agent.description: TDD practitioner: RED→GREEN→REFACTOR cycle with UT + API test layers

reviewer-logic.description: Logic reviewer: correctness bugs, edge cases, error handling

reviewer-security.description: Security reviewer: vulnerabilities, data exposure, auth/authz issues

reviewer-performance.description: Performance reviewer: bottlenecks, N+1 queries, memory leaks, scalability
